Load Balancing

Event-Driven Architecture

Event-driven architecture shifts communication toward immutable domain events, asynchronous consumers, and operational discipline around contracts, idempotency, and observability.

Event-Driven фундамент

Producers and consumers exchange events through a broker or log, which introduces eventual consistency and requires idempotent consumers.

  • Producers publish facts.
  • Consumers build projections.

Частые ошибки

Teams often introduce asynchronous messaging without explicit event contracts or replay discipline.

Martin Fowler Event Sourcing
